TEXT.source: Amis Wikipedia, article: O_pikiningan_ci_Makay_Foksian_a_lomi’ad_(馬偕博士紀念日)
TEXT.citation: O_pikiningan_ci_Makay_Foksian_a_lomi’ad_(馬偕博士紀念日). (2025, May 05). In Wikipedia [Amis]. https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/O_pikiningan_ci_Makay_Foksian_a_lomi’ad_(馬偕博士紀念日)
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_O_pikiningan_ci_Makay_Foksian_a_lomi’ad_(馬偕博士紀念日), title = O_pikiningan_ci_Makay_Foksian_a_lomi’ad_(馬偕博士紀念日), year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/O_pikiningan_ci_Makay_Foksian_a_lomi’ad_(馬偕博士紀念日)} }

S.FORM: Naitini i 1871 amihecaan, iraay ko naitiniay i Kanata hananay a kanatar, to matayaray mipat'enakay tosowal no Kawas ci Makay ami rakowi to riyaar atainy i Taywan , marawod ko pangkiw no mihecaan mafana' to ami sano payrang a somowal, ami patenak to sowal no Kawas, malawod ko cecay a mihecaan i, mirakowi to kalolotok ato kalo'alo a taira i Towcen no Yilan hananay a niyalo' , saworakat sanay ko tayal nira ami rahci mitilid to likisi no Taywan itini tora 19~20 mihecaan, tadamaan ko pitilid nira to kalomaamaan no rengos ato kilang, ato sota', ato kolotamtamdaw no Taywan hananay. Itini i kalolomia'mia'd nira ami sarakarakat a tayra icowaco:wa i, micomod to kasanialo' ami patenak to sowal no Kawas, ato amiadah to ciadadaay, ato mipatireng topicodadan, iraay amatidi nira ko kalo'orip no Yincoming , aca topipatileng nira to sa'ayaway a pina'angan to kalomaamaan a Powokan hananay, adihay ko pihamham nira to i Taywanay a damdaw, aca ma'osaw ira ama tilid ko kafahekaan a demak a kimmad. Itini i rolay ni Makay a matayal i, caay to komamasa'osi ko hakowaay toko miadahan nira to adada no tileng ato mihinoman nira to faloco' no kolotamtamdaw, tagasa i ka'ayaw no paday nira a ciadada to tata^akay to aycen no takoraw nira, a tangasa to a caay kaga'ay ninga a caciyaw, nikaorira paci^ci sacingra a pakaynien nira i tilid a nipasifana' to minanamay a damdaw, tangasa i 1901.06.02 a mihcaan ato folad ato romi'ad i, itira cingra i Tangsoy a mapatay, ami rahci toya misowalan nira to"ngaay a matodoh, mikikaka toka pohed " . Itini tora pikiningan toka kapatayan aromia'd ni Makay foksi i, matiyatona sano pairangay a misangaan nira a 'olic kosapa rikor ami pahapinang to polong no 'olip nira : "Toninian polong toka olahan no mako a Taywan. Polongen ako ami pafeli itini tisowanan. Toninian polong toka olahan no mako a Taywan. Polong kaolahan ako masahetoay to itini. Itini i 'owu'owulan ama'alaw ako ko karoloto. Pakayni i 'owu'owulan amanengneng ako ko enar. Mitapar to tapelik no riyal pasayla ira:ay to niaro' . Tadamaan ko olah nomako ami tatapal. Caayko mamiliyas ko faloco ako to Taywan. O polong no 'orip no mako saheto saan on miso. Caaiko mamiliyas ko faloco' ako to Taywan. O lipahak no faloco' nomako saheto saan ono miso. Nanay itini i tolas no 'rip no mako. Naitini i pisariyariyaw no tapelik no riyar ama soni. Naitini i pingiyangi no 'adingo no 'aol ato kilang. Pakakera to katangasaan no 'orip ako aminokay. Tadakaolahan polong no faloco' ako Taywan. Ya ! " Naitini tora 'olic mahapinang toko faloco' nira to olah tonian sota noniyaro' , matiyato o ninian mitiridan ni Makay Hakasi a 'olic, polong no 'olip nira a mapatorod i tini i Taywan, tangasa itolas no sasela'an ningra. 6 Folad 2 lomi'ad, mapolong kita ami kansa to naitiniay i Kanata a tada Taywan a damdaw ci Makay Foksi ! O mitiridan naitini i "Kaolahan Taywan"a Facebook to wangye
S.PHON: naitini i **** amiħəʦaan, iraaj ko~u naitiniaj i kanata ħananaj a kanatar, to~u matajaraj mipatʡənakaj to~uso~uwaɾ no~u kawas ʦi makaj ami rako~uwi to~u rijaar atainj i tajwan , marawo~uɬ~ɮ ko~u paŋkiw no~u miħəʦaan mafanaʡ to~u ami sano~u pajraŋ a so~umo~uwaɾ, ami patənak to~u so~uwaɾ no~u kawas, maɾawo~uɬ~ɮ ko~u ʦəʦaj a miħəʦaan i, mirako~uwi to~u kaɾo~uɾo~uto~uk ato~u kaɾo~uʡaɾo~u a taira i to~uwʦən no~u jiɾan ħananaj a nijaɾo~uʡ , sawo~urakat sanaj ko~u tajaɾ nira ami raħʦi mitiɾiɬ~ɮ to~u ɾikisi no~u tajwan itini to~ura **~** miħəʦaan, taɬ~ɮamaan ko~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮ nira to~u kaɾo~umaamaan no~u rəŋo~us ato~u kiɾaŋ, ato~u so~utaʡ, ato~u ko~uɾo~utamtamɬ~ɮaw no~u tajwan ħananaj. itini i kaɾo~uɾo~umiaʡmiaʡɬ~ɮ nira ami sarakarakat a tajra iʦo~uwaʦo~u:wa i, miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ to~u kasaniaɾo~uʡ ami patənak to~u so~uwaɾ no~u kawas, ato~u amiaɬ~ɮaħ to~u ʦiaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj, ato~u mipatirəŋ to~upiʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan, iraaj amatiɬ~ɮi nira ko~u kaɾo~uʡo~urip no~u jinʦo~umiŋ , aʦa to~upipatiɾəŋ nira to~u saʡajawaj a pinaʡaŋan to~u kaɾo~umaamaan a po~uwo~ukan ħananaj, aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u piħamħam nira to~u i tajwanaj a ɬ~ɮamɬ~ɮaw, aʦa maʡo~usaw ira ama tiɾiɬ~ɮ ko~u kafaħəkaan a ɬ~ɮəmak a kimmaɬ~ɮ. itini i ro~uɾaj ni makaj a matajaɾ i, ʦaaj to~u ko~umamasaʡo~usi ko~u ħako~uwaaj to~uko~u miaɬ~ɮaħan nira to~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa no~u tiɾəŋ ato~u miħino~uman nira to~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ no~u ko~uɾo~utamtamɬ~ɮaw, ta*asa i kaʡajaw no~u paɬ~ɮaj nira a ʦiaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa to~u tataʔakaj to~u ajʦən no~u tako~uraw nira, a taŋasa to~u a ʦaaj ka*aʡaj niŋa a ʦaʦijaw, nikao~urira paʦiʔʦi saʦiŋra a pakajniən nira i tiɾiɬ~ɮ a nipasifanaʡ to~u minanamaj a ɬ~ɮamɬ~ɮaw, taŋasa i ****.**.** a miħʦaan ato~u fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ato~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ i, itira ʦiŋra i taŋso~uj a mapataj, ami raħʦi to~uja miso~uwaɾan nira to~u"ŋaaj a mato~uɬ~ɮo~uħ, mikikaka to~uka po~uħəɬ~ɮ " . itini to~ura pikiniŋan to~uka kapatajan aro~umiaʡɬ~ɮ ni makaj fo~uksi i, matijato~una sano~u pairaŋaj a misaŋaan nira a ʡo~uɾiʦ ko~usapa riko~ur ami paħapinaŋ to~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u ʡo~uɾip nira : "to~uninian po~uɾo~uŋ to~uka o~uɾaħan no~u mako~u a tajwan. po~uɾo~uŋən ako~u ami pafəɾi itini tiso~uwanan. to~uninian po~uɾo~uŋ to~uka o~uɾaħan no~u mako~u a tajwan. po~uɾo~uŋ kao~uɾaħan ako~u masaħəto~uaj to~u itini. itini i ʡo~uwo~u~uʡo~uwo~u~uɾan amaʡaɾaw ako~u ko~u karo~uɾo~uto~u. pakajni i ʡo~uwo~u~uʡo~uwo~u~uɾan amanəŋnəŋ ako~u ko~u ənar. mitapar to~u tapəɾik no~u rijaɾ pasajɾa ira:aj to~u niaro~uʡ . taɬ~ɮamaan ko~u o~uɾaħ no~umako~u ami tatapaɾ. ʦaajko~u mamiɾijas ko~u faɾo~uʦo~u ako~u to~u tajwan. o~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u ʡo~urip no~u mako~u saħəto~u saan o~un miso~u. ʦaaiko~u mamiɾijas ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ ako~u to~u tajwan. o~u ɾipaħak no~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ no~umako~u saħəto~u saan o~uno~u miso~u. nanaj itini i to~uɾas no~u ʡrip no~u mako~u. naitini i pisarijarijaw no~u tapəɾik no~u rijar ama so~uni. naitini i piŋijaŋi no~u ʡaɬ~ɮiŋo~u no~u ʡao~uɾ ato~u kiɾaŋ. pakakəra to~u kataŋasaan no~u ʡo~urip ako~u amino~ukaj. taɬ~ɮakao~uɾaħan po~uɾo~uŋ no~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ ako~u tajwan. ja ! " naitini to~ura ʡo~uɾiʦ maħapinaŋ to~uko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ nira to~u o~uɾaħ to~unian so~uta no~unijaro~uʡ , matijato~u o~u ninian mitiriɬ~ɮan ni makaj ħakasi a ʡo~uɾiʦ, po~uɾo~uŋ no~u ʡo~uɾip nira a mapato~uro~uɬ~ɮ i tini i tajwan, taŋasa ito~uɾas no~u sasəɾaʡan niŋra. * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ɾo~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, mapo~uɾo~uŋ kita ami kansa to~u naitiniaj i kanata a taɬ~ɮa tajwan a ɬ~ɮamɬ~ɮaw ʦi makaj fo~uksi ! o~u mitiriɬ~ɮan naitini i "kao~uɾaħan tajwan"a faʦəb~b~vo~uo~uk to~u waŋjə
S.FORM: Naitini i 1871 amihecaan, iraay ko naitiniay i Kanata hananay a kanatar, to matayaray mipat'enakay tosowal no Kawas ci Makay ami rakowi to riyaar atainy i Taywan , marawod ko pangkiw no mihecaan mafana' to ami sano payrang a somowal, ami patenak to sowal no Kawas, malawod ko cecay a mihecaan i, mirakowi to kalolotok ato kalo'alo a taira i Towcen no Yilan hananay a niyalo' , saworakat sanay ko tayal nira ami rahci mitilid to likisi no Taywan itini tora 19~20 mihecaan, tadamaan ko pitilid nira to kalomaamaan no rengos ato kilang, ato sota', ato kolotamtamdaw no Taywan hananay. Itini i kalolomia'mia'd nira ami sarakarakat a tayra icowaco:wa i, micomod to kasanialo' ami patenak to sowal no Kawas, ato amiadah to ciadadaay, ato mipatireng topicodadan, iraay amatidi nira ko kalo'orip no Yincoming , aca topipatileng nira to sa'ayaway a pina'angan to kalomaamaan a Powokan hananay, adihay ko pihamham nira to i Taywanay a damdaw, aca ma'osaw ira ama tilid ko kafahekaan a demak a kimmad. Itini i rolay ni Makay a matayal i, caay to komamasa'osi ko hakowaay toko miadahan nira to adada no tileng ato mihinoman nira to faloco' no kolotamtamdaw, tagasa i ka'ayaw no paday nira a ciadada to tata^akay to aycen no takoraw nira, a tangasa to a caay kaga'ay ninga a caciyaw, nikaorira paci^ci sacingra a pakaynien nira i tilid a nipasifana' to minanamay a damdaw, tangasa i 1901.06.02 a mihcaan ato folad ato romi'ad i, itira cingra i Tangsoy a mapatay, ami rahci toya misowalan nira to"ngaay a matodoh, mikikaka toka pohed " . Itini tora pikiningan toka kapatayan aromia'd ni Makay foksi i, matiyatona sano pairangay a misangaan nira a 'olic kosapa rikor ami pahapinang to polong no 'olip nira : "Toninian polong toka olahan no mako a Taywan. Polongen ako ami pafeli itini tisowanan. Toninian polong toka olahan no mako a Taywan. Polong kaolahan ako masahetoay to itini. Itini i 'owu'owulan ama'alaw ako ko karoloto. Pakayni i 'owu'owulan amanengneng ako ko enar. Mitapar to tapelik no riyal pasayla ira:ay to niaro' . Tadamaan ko olah nomako ami tatapal. Caayko mamiliyas ko faloco ako to Taywan. O polong no 'orip no mako saheto saan on miso. Caaiko mamiliyas ko faloco' ako to Taywan. O lipahak no faloco' nomako saheto saan ono miso. Nanay itini i tolas no 'rip no mako. Naitini i pisariyariyaw no tapelik no riyar ama soni. Naitini i pingiyangi no 'adingo no 'aol ato kilang. Pakakera to katangasaan no 'orip ako aminokay. Tadakaolahan polong no faloco' ako Taywan. Ya ! " Naitini tora 'olic mahapinang toko faloco' nira to olah tonian sota noniyaro' , matiyato o ninian mitiridan ni Makay Hakasi a 'olic, polong no 'olip nira a mapatorod i tini i Taywan, tangasa itolas no sasela'an ningra. 6 Folad 2 lomi'ad, mapolong kita ami kansa to naitiniay i Kanata a tada Taywan a damdaw ci Makay Foksi ! O mitiridan naitini i "Kaolahan Taywan"a Facebook to wangye
S.PHON: naitini i **** amiħəʦaan, iraaj ko~u naitiniaj i kanata ħananaj a kanatar, to~u matajaraj mipatʡənakaj to~uso~uwaɾ no~u kawas ʦi makaj ami rako~uwi to~u rijaar atainj i tajwan , marawo~uɬ~ɮ ko~u paŋkiw no~u miħəʦaan mafanaʡ to~u ami sano~u pajraŋ a so~umo~uwaɾ, ami patənak to~u so~uwaɾ no~u kawas, maɾawo~uɬ~ɮ ko~u ʦəʦaj a miħəʦaan i, mirako~uwi to~u kaɾo~uɾo~uto~uk ato~u kaɾo~uʡaɾo~u a taira i to~uwʦən no~u jiɾan ħananaj a nijaɾo~uʡ , sawo~urakat sanaj ko~u tajaɾ nira ami raħʦi mitiɾiɬ~ɮ to~u ɾikisi no~u tajwan itini to~ura **~** miħəʦaan, taɬ~ɮamaan ko~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮ nira to~u kaɾo~umaamaan no~u rəŋo~us ato~u kiɾaŋ, ato~u so~utaʡ, ato~u ko~uɾo~utamtamɬ~ɮaw no~u tajwan ħananaj. itini i kaɾo~uɾo~umiaʡmiaʡɬ~ɮ nira ami sarakarakat a tajra iʦo~uwaʦo~u:wa i, miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ to~u kasaniaɾo~uʡ ami patənak to~u so~uwaɾ no~u kawas, ato~u amiaɬ~ɮaħ to~u ʦiaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj, ato~u mipatirəŋ to~upiʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan, iraaj amatiɬ~ɮi nira ko~u kaɾo~uʡo~urip no~u jinʦo~umiŋ , aʦa to~upipatiɾəŋ nira to~u saʡajawaj a pinaʡaŋan to~u kaɾo~umaamaan a po~uwo~ukan ħananaj, aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u piħamħam nira to~u i tajwanaj a ɬ~ɮamɬ~ɮaw, aʦa maʡo~usaw ira ama tiɾiɬ~ɮ ko~u kafaħəkaan a ɬ~ɮəmak a kimmaɬ~ɮ. itini i ro~uɾaj ni makaj a matajaɾ i, ʦaaj to~u ko~umamasaʡo~usi ko~u ħako~uwaaj to~uko~u miaɬ~ɮaħan nira to~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa no~u tiɾəŋ ato~u miħino~uman nira to~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ no~u ko~uɾo~utamtamɬ~ɮaw, ta*asa i kaʡajaw no~u paɬ~ɮaj nira a ʦiaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa to~u tataʔakaj to~u ajʦən no~u tako~uraw nira, a taŋasa to~u a ʦaaj ka*aʡaj niŋa a ʦaʦijaw, nikao~urira paʦiʔʦi saʦiŋra a pakajniən nira i tiɾiɬ~ɮ a nipasifanaʡ to~u minanamaj a ɬ~ɮamɬ~ɮaw, taŋasa i ****.**.** a miħʦaan ato~u fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ato~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ i, itira ʦiŋra i taŋso~uj a mapataj, ami raħʦi to~uja miso~uwaɾan nira to~u"ŋaaj a mato~uɬ~ɮo~uħ, mikikaka to~uka po~uħəɬ~ɮ " . itini to~ura pikiniŋan to~uka kapatajan aro~umiaʡɬ~ɮ ni makaj fo~uksi i, matijato~una sano~u pairaŋaj a misaŋaan nira a ʡo~uɾiʦ ko~usapa riko~ur ami paħapinaŋ to~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u ʡo~uɾip nira : "to~uninian po~uɾo~uŋ to~uka o~uɾaħan no~u mako~u a tajwan. po~uɾo~uŋən ako~u ami pafəɾi itini tiso~uwanan. to~uninian po~uɾo~uŋ to~uka o~uɾaħan no~u mako~u a tajwan. po~uɾo~uŋ kao~uɾaħan ako~u masaħəto~uaj to~u itini. itini i ʡo~uwo~u~uʡo~uwo~u~uɾan amaʡaɾaw ako~u ko~u karo~uɾo~uto~u. pakajni i ʡo~uwo~u~uʡo~uwo~u~uɾan amanəŋnəŋ ako~u ko~u ənar. mitapar to~u tapəɾik no~u rijaɾ pasajɾa ira:aj to~u niaro~uʡ . taɬ~ɮamaan ko~u o~uɾaħ no~umako~u ami tatapaɾ. ʦaajko~u mamiɾijas ko~u faɾo~uʦo~u ako~u to~u tajwan. o~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u ʡo~urip no~u mako~u saħəto~u saan o~un miso~u. ʦaaiko~u mamiɾijas ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ ako~u to~u tajwan. o~u ɾipaħak no~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ no~umako~u saħəto~u saan o~uno~u miso~u. nanaj itini i to~uɾas no~u ʡrip no~u mako~u. naitini i pisarijarijaw no~u tapəɾik no~u rijar ama so~uni. naitini i piŋijaŋi no~u ʡaɬ~ɮiŋo~u no~u ʡao~uɾ ato~u kiɾaŋ. pakakəra to~u kataŋasaan no~u ʡo~urip ako~u amino~ukaj. taɬ~ɮakao~uɾaħan po~uɾo~uŋ no~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ ako~u tajwan. ja ! " naitini to~ura ʡo~uɾiʦ maħapinaŋ to~uko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ nira to~u o~uɾaħ to~unian so~uta no~unijaro~uʡ , matijato~u o~u ninian mitiriɬ~ɮan ni makaj ħakasi a ʡo~uɾiʦ, po~uɾo~uŋ no~u ʡo~uɾip nira a mapato~uro~uɬ~ɮ i tini i tajwan, taŋasa ito~uɾas no~u sasəɾaʡan niŋra. * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ɾo~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, mapo~uɾo~uŋ kita ami kansa to~u naitiniaj i kanata a taɬ~ɮa tajwan a ɬ~ɮamɬ~ɮaw ʦi makaj fo~uksi ! o~u mitiriɬ~ɮan naitini i "kao~uɾaħan tajwan"a faʦəb~b~vo~uo~uk to~u waŋjə
